experiments.hypothesis: If we enhance the product description with size charts and lifestyle images, then the return rate will decrease by 30% within the next 30 days.
experiments.change_required: Add lifestyle images and detailed size charts to DJ-6 Bahubali Six on Meesho.

experiments.hypothesis: If we increase the ad budget by 20% for DJ-5 Bahubali, targeting high-intent keywords, then the sales will increase by 25% within the next 14 days.
experiments.change_required: Increase ad budget by 20% for DJ-5 Bahubali on Flipkart, focusing on high-intent keywords.
